backingDescription: USYC provides exposure to short-term U.S. Treasury bills and reverse repurchase agreements backed by short-term U.S. government securities through Hashnote International Short Duration Yield Fund Ltd. Official sources describe the product as a tokenized money market fund / yield-bearing collateral product for eligible non-U.S. investors.
reserveBreakdown: Short-term U.S. Treasury bills and reverse repurchase agreements backed by short-term U.S. government securities. Detailed public holdings or percentage breakdown was not found during source discovery.

_meta.notes: Backing type and redemption asset are source-backed. No explicit public collateralization ratio, custodian, proof-of-reserves oracle, reserve audit URL/date, or detailed holdings report was found. USYC price/NAV oracle must not be treated as proof-of-reserves. Auditor is sourced from Hashnote service-provider documentation; verify against public audit/fund reports before institutional-grade scoring.
